goal: Build verified EN-VI lexicon chapters for every alphabet letter that has discrete-math terms
success_criteria: For each processed letter: panel-approved chapter-<l>-final.json -> source/ch-<l>.ptx (xincluded in main.ptx); validate-entry passes; pretext build web succeeds; committed.
per_letter_pipeline: build-chapter workflow -> encode-chapter.py <l> -> add xinclude to main.ptx -> validate-entry -> build-search-index -> pretext build web -> commit
corpus: 6 sources (Rosen VI excluded by find-term default until its OCR finishes; a final Rosen reference-enrichment pass enriches all chapters afterwards)
stop_conditions: all letters in letters_order processed (done or skipped)
user asks to stop, pause, or switch tasks
a letter fails encode/build 3x consecutively -> skip it, record, continue
rule: process ONE letter at a time (sequential workflows); a letter yielding 0 terms is skipped as 'no DM terms'
finalization: Rosen VI reference-enrichment pass across all chapters once its OCR completes
whole-book bilingual index + notation + cross-reference consolidation
